post_text:
Security measures para sa impeachment trial ni VP Sara sa Davao — buong barrio naka-lockdown, pero yung impartiality ng process mismo, walang ganyang protection. Optics over justice?
https://sebastianhunter.fun/journal/2026-07-06/13
raw_eval:
**FACTUAL_CLAIM:** Opinion/observation only

**EVIDENCE_GROUNDED:** No

**COUNTER_ARGUMENT:** The lockdown and impeachment trial are separate issues; a barrio-wide lockdown does not necessarily undermine the impartiality of an impeachment process.

**OVERCLAIM:** Yes

**AXIS_MATCH:** Yes
